channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: SURI: The Seventh Note demo launches May 21
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5

A side-scrolling rhythm action platformer.

A demo for PlayStation India Hero Project side-scrolling rhythm action platformer SURI: The Seventh Note will launch for PlayStation 5 and PC via Steam on May 21, developer Tathvamasi announced.

“The demo provides a glimpse into the title’s unique harmony between fast paced platforming and rhythm,” Tathvamasi said in a press release. “With cinematic pursuits where every action aligns with the beat and obstacles and adversaries vibrate in time with an immersive original score, SURI: The Seventh Note ensures that the player’s journey remains perfectly in tune with the island’s melodic pulse.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Tathvamasi:

About

Explore the rhythmic world of Ragamandala where the world resonates to the beat of an enigmatic rhythm.

SURI: The Seventh Note is a 2D Metroidvania set in mythical India. Its a game with a unique rhythmic twist where the world reacts to the beats of an enigmatic rhythm. Navigate a world that constantly shifts and changes to find the secret of the rhythm. Journey through many varied biomes inspired by the diverse landscape of India and its mythology.

Key Features

  • A Rhythmic World – From the flickering of a flame to giant waterwheels, the world moves in unison, tethered to an enigmatic rhythm. Only few beings such as yourself are free from this curse. Explore the world by feeling the rhythm and navigating perilous traps.
  • Bold Art – We want to give a new look to the Metroidvania genre by imagining a world that is distinctively Indian even in the smallest of details. The pen and ink art style brings out the bold, colorful, and dramatic vibe of India while we model our environment and architecture based on iconic locations from the country.
  • Set in Mythical India – We are trying to bring up places, characters and stories from the rich tapestry of Indian mythology while being respectful of our religions.
  • Varied Biomes – We are modelling each of our biomes from the wide and varied landscape of India. We are inspired by the Deserts and ancient Forts of Rajasthan, the Serene temples nestled in Himalayas, the Ancient civilizations deep within the Western Ghats, the Magnificent Ajantha Ellora Caves, and many more. We want to highlight the diversity of the Indian landscape and culture through our game.
  • Music That Moves – We are taking inspiration from the folk music and its history from the lands and cultures that define the various biomes of the game. We want the game’s music to be a reflection of India’s musical landscape which is as rich and varied as the country itself.
  • Inspirations – Our gameplay is inspired by legendary Metroidvanias such as Hollow Knight, Ori and the Will of the Wisps, the Bloodstained series, and many more. Our art is bold, colorful, and dramatic and we are inspired by the works of Killian Eng and Maxime Desmettre. We are also taking inspirations from games such as Hades and Banner saga.

SURI: The Seventh Note will be available for PlayStation 5 and PC via Steam. A release date has yet to be announced.

Watch a new trailer below.

Demo Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/suri-the-seventh-note-demo-launches-may-21
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Famitsu Sales: 4/27/26 – 5/10/26
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream moves an additional 299,619 retail copies.

Famitsu has published its estimated physical game software data for Japan for the two weeks spanning April 27, 2026 to May 10, 2026.

Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream for Switch remained the highest selling game, moving another 299,619 retail copies.

On the hardware side, Switch 2 sold 214,438 units, the Switch family sold 40,849 units, the PlayStation 5 family sold 23,760 units, and the Xbox Series family sold 513 units.

Get the full sales charts below.

Software Sales (followed by lifetime sales)

  1. [NSW] Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream (Nintendo, 04/16/26) – 299,619 (1,043,557)
  2. [SW2] Pokemon Pokopia (The Pokemon Company, 03/05/26) – 51,662 (978,706)
  3. [SW2] Mario Kart World (Nintendo, 06/05/25) – 19,479 (2,925,858)
  4. [NSW] Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen (Konami, 11/13/25) – 11,950 (355,691)
  5. [PS5] PRAGMATA (Capcom, 04/17/26) – 10,262 (59,518)
  6. [NSW] Minecraft (Microsoft, 06/21/18) – 10,208 (4,203,737)
  7. [NSW] Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2 (Nintendo, 10/02/25) – 9,847 (179,024)
  8. [SW2] Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Nintendo, 01/15/26) – 8,257 (116,869)
  9. [NSW] Animal Crossing: New Horizons (Nintendo, 03/20/20) – 7,411 (8,433,456)
  10. [NSW] Super Smash Bros. Ultimate (Nintendo, 12/07/18) – 6,892 (5,910,721)

Rankings 11 to 30 will be announced on May 15.

  1. [PS5] Saros (SIE, 04/30/26) – (New)
  2. [PS5] Shinigami Hime to Ishokan no Kaibutsu (Nippon Ichi Software, 04/30/26) – (New)
  3. [NSW] Shinigami Hime to Ishokan no Kaibutsu (Nippon Ichi Software, 04/30/26) – (New)
  4. [SW2] LoveR Kiss: Endless Memories – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Dragami Games, 04/30/26) – (New)
  5. [NSW] Dear Mirror Flower (Kogado Studio, 04/30/26) – (New)
  6. [NSW] Perennial Dusk: Kinsenka (Bushiroad Games, 04/30/26) – (New)
  7. [SW2] PRAGMATA (Capcom, 04/24/26) –
  8. [NSW] Matsurika no Kei -kEi- Tenmei kashokuden (Idea Factory, 04/23/26) –
  9. [NSW] Elminage ORIGINAL: Priestess of Darkness and The Ring of the Gods (Mebius, 04/23/26) –
  10. [NSW] Kingdom’s Return: Time-Eating Fruit and the Ancient Monster (Inti Creates, 04/23/26) –
  11. [NSW] Castle of Shikigami Trilogy (Cosmo Machia, 04/23/26) –
  12. [NSW] Pokemon Legends: Z-A (The Pokemon Company, 10/16/25) –
  13. [NSW] Nintendo Switch Sports (NIntendo, 04/29/22) –
  14. [SW2] Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park (Nintendo, 03/26/26) –
  15. [NSW] Pokemon FireRed Version / LeafGreen Version (Download Card) (The Pokemon Company, 02/28/26) –
  16. [SW2] Pokemon Legends: Z-A – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (The Pokemon Company, 10/16/25) –
  17. [NSW] Mario Kart 8 Deluxe (Nintendo, 04/28/17) –
  18. [SW2] Resident Evil Requiem (Capcom, 02/27/26) –
  19. [NSW] Super Mario Party Jamboree (Nintendo, 10/17/24) –
  20. [SW2] Mario Tennis Fever (Nintendo, 02/12/26) –
  21. [PS5] Crimson Desert (Pearl Abyss, 03/19/26) –
  22. [SW2] Super Mario Party Jamboree – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Jamboree TV (Nintendo, 07/24/25) –
  23. [SW2] Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Konami, 11/13/25) –
  24. [NSW] Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection (Capcom, 03/27/26) –
  25. [NSW] Splatoon 3 (Nintendo, 09/09/22) –
  26. [SW2] Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection (Capcom, 03/13/26) –

Hardware Sales (followed by lifetime sales)

  1. Switch 2 – 214,438 (5,367,660)
  2. Switch OLED Model – 16,850 (9,571,489)
  3. PlayStation 5 Digital Edition – 16,539 (1,283,342)
  4. Switch Lite – 16,039 (6,958,407)
  5. Switch – 7,960 (20,292,060)
  6. PlayStation 5 Pro – 5,248 (355,220)
  7. PlayStation 5 – 1,973 (5,918,111)
  8. Xbox Series X Digital Edition – 352 (30,490)
  9. Xbox Series S – 97 (341,958)
  10. Xbox Series X – 64 (326,386)


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/famitsu-sales-4-27-26-5-10-26
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: High Times launches July 23
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

Manage your own cafe and play the role of a donut therapist.

Narrative dating and cooking simulation game High Times will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam on July 23, developer Yangyang Mobile announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Yangyang Mobile:

About

Donuts, drama, and “the hotbox.”

Pastries are the key to the soul. High Times puts players behind the counter of a very special donut shop. This isn’t just about making a snack; it’s about Donut Therapy. By carefully selecting ingredients at the proper moment, players can turn a simple donut into a salve for what ails their customers. Whether a customer is seeking courage, comfort, or a way to mend a broken heart, your culinary choices will determine their emotional fate.

The shop is also a hub for high-stakes drama. As you build new relationships and navigate the complexities of your own past, you’ll find that “closure” isn’t always on the menu—but with over 30 unique characters to meet, the power of a heartfelt conversation and a perfectly glazed donut can change everything.

Key Features

  • Donut Therapy – Pay close attention to your customers’ stories to cook the perfect mood-altering treat. The right ingredients at the right time can solve even the most complex emotional problems.
  • Cafe Progression – Grow your business by creating and evolving recipes. Earn tips to purchase more than 100 store decorations, and unlock advanced tools to tackle more elaborate culinary challenges.
  • Relationships with Consequences – Discover the stories of 30+ diverse customers. Six of these characters are romanceable, allowing you to use “donut woo” to win their hearts. With multiple endings per customer, your choices lead to genuinely different outcomes.
  • Premium Visual Novel Presentation – Experience a rich, immersive world featuring a full English voice cast, a catchy theme song, an original soundtrack and fully animated cutscenes.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/high-times-launches-july-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Order of the Sinking Star adds Switch 2 version
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Narrative puzzle adventure game due out in 2026.

Narrative puzzle adventure game Order of the Sinking Star will launch for Switch 2 alongside its previously announced PC (Steam) version in 2026, publisher Arc Games and developer Thekla announced.

“We’re very happy to bring Order of the Sinking Star to Nintendo Switch 2,” said Thekla founder Jonathan Blow in a press release. “The game is huge and has many, many puzzles, so Switch 2’s portability is really nice here; you can just pick it up and play it in short bursts or really dive in for a long time.”

Arc Games CEO Yoon Im added, “We’re entering the Switch 2 space in a major way with our first release for the platform being Order of the Sinking Star. Ever since the console was announced, we’ve been looking forward to the chance to bring one of our games to the platform. With Switch 2’s impressive features, including its instant-resume features, we believe it makes it the perfect home for this innovative puzzle adventure from the incredible team at Thekla, Inc.”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via Arc Games:

About

From legendary director Jonathan Blow (Braid, The Witness) comes Order of the Sinking Star, a massive narrative adventure featuring more than one thousand hand-crafted puzzles designed to put your intellect to the test. You are transported to a realm of curious magic, dangerous contraptions, and vicious monsters. You’ll explore four distinct worlds, each with its own mechanics, characters, and stories, and then watch as they all collide.

As the worlds merge, and characters meet one another, puzzle systems intertwine, creating surprising new possibilities. Explore at your own pace, revisit worlds and return to challenges as you see fit. Discover unique playable characters, master evolving gameplay mechanics, and decipher the deep mysteries of a sprawling, interconnected game world. Blending exploration, storytelling, and ever-progressing mechanics, Order of the Sinking Star invites you into a mysterious, living puzzle unlike anything you’ve played.

Key Features

  • Master a Thousand Interwoven Challenges – Embark on an innovative puzzle adventure with dozens of game mechanics and hundreds of hours of unique gameplay. Each puzzle builds on the last, introducing new game mechanics that reward curiosity and persistence.
  • Choose Your Path, Roam at Your Pace – Explore four expansive, mysterious game worlds, each with its own characters, rules, dangers, and secrets waiting to be uncovered. Come and go as you like; you are free to take on the puzzles you discover at your own pace.
  • Take the Helm of Some Unlikely Heroes – A queen, a thief, a warrior, a wizard, and a talking boat are just some of the heroes of this tale. Each character wields complimentary abilities and has captivating stories to tell.
  • Decipher an Epic Tale – As playable characters begin to meet and worlds collide, the mystery untangles. Through gameplay and notes you collect, you learn more about this enigmatic realm. Piece by piece and clue by clue, you’ll uncover the secrets of the Order of the Sinking Star.

Watch a new trailer and message from Jonathan Blow below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Switch 2 Announce Trailer

Message from Jonathan Blow



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/order-of-the-sinking-star-adds-switch-2-version
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
